name: Standard Chartered Super Value Titanium Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Telephone & mobile bills (min transaction Rs 750 via BillPay)
Other utility bills (min transaction Rs 750 via BillPay)

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
Utility/Telecom transactions below Rs 750 or made outside SC BillPay
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 90,000 or more in the previous year

selfEmployed: Minimum annual income equivalent to Rs 55,000/month or subject to bank criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
5% cashback on fuel transactions up to Rs 2,000 (monthly cashback cap of Rs 200). Fuel surcharge waiver is not applicable.
5% cashback on telephone bills via BillPay (minimum transaction of Rs 750, monthly cap of Rs 200).
5% cashback on utility bills via BillPay (minimum transaction of Rs 750, monthly cap of Rs 100).
Other retail spends earn 1 reward point per Rs 150 spent. 1 point = Rs 0.25 (effectively 0.17% return value).
